According to the following TAF, a pilot planning to take off from Frankfurt airport (EDDF) on the 7th of the month at 14:00 UTC could expect (1) _____ visibility, a wind speed of (2) _____, and (3) _____ clouds.

EDDF TAF 061000Z 0612/0718 23012KT 7000 SCT026 BECMG 0615/0618 22020KT BECMG 0700/0703 16015KT 8000 FEW026 BECMG 0709/0712 24010KT 7000 SCT028 BECMG 0715/0718 22008KT FEW035
